name: files-api
description: Patient-document storage API on S3 (presigned URLs), mirroring the worker-r2 contract.

scripts.build: npm install --omit=dev --no-audit --no-fund && mkdir -p dist && rm -f dist/files-api.zip && zip -qr dist/files-api.zip src node_modules package.json && echo 'Built dist/files-api.zip'
